name: Praxis Debt Solutions
description_short: Praxis Credit Consulting offers credit repair services including dispute assistance, credit report analysis, and score improvement across the Southwest. Free credit evaluations available.
description_long:
Praxis Credit Consulting has operated for over two decades providing credit repair services to individuals and families throughout the Southwest region, including Texas, Arizona, New Mexico, Nevada, and Colorado. The company positions itself as a comprehensive credit solution provider focused on helping consumers re-establish, clean up, or repair their credit profiles.

The company offers several core services: credit report analysis, credit score repair, credit re-establishment programs, debt settlement consultation, budgeting tools, credit repair education, credit qualification assessment, and business credit services. They advertise flexible scheduling including early mornings and weekends, and provide free initial credit consultations that include pulling and reviewing credit reports. Customers can access a customer portal for ongoing management.

Proasis differentiates itself through emphasis on personalized coaching combined with technology tools. They highlight their "compassionate, friendly staff" and claim to provide clients with a "road map" and technology platform to meet credit goals. Their programs are marketed as "simple easy to follow steps at affordable pricing," though specific pricing details are not clearly published on the main website.

Based on available website content, the company appears legitimate and established, though some limitations exist: pricing structures are not transparent (only generic consultant pricing tiers appear referenced), specific success metrics or guarantees are not provided, and the extent to which they handle dispute filing versus client-directed disputing is unclear. The business model combines elements of credit repair consulting with debt settlement services.
pros: Over 20 years of operating experience in the credit repair industry
Free credit consultation and credit report analysis for new clients
Serves five-state Southwest region with multiple physical locations
Flexible scheduling including evenings and weekends
Offers bundled services including budgeting tools and credit education
Provides technology platform combined with personal coaching
Includes business credit services beyond personal credit repair
cons: Pricing is not transparently displayed on website; generic consultant tiers shown instead of actual service costs
No specific success rates, timelines, or performance guarantees are documented
Website organization is somewhat unclear about which services fall under credit repair vs. debt settlement
Limited detail on dispute process methodology or FCRA compliance procedures
No published reviews, testimonials, or case studies visible on provided website content
best_for: Consumers in Texas, Arizona, New Mexico, Nevada, or Colorado seeking local credit repair guidance
Individuals wanting combined credit repair consultation with debt settlement exploration
Clients preferring personal coaching alongside technology tools for credit improvement
diagnosis: Praxis Credit Consulting is best for Southwest-region consumers seeking hands-on credit repair with personalized coaching. Main caveat: transparent pricing and documented success metrics are absent from their marketing materials, making it difficult to evaluate value or outcomes before consultation.
